title: Intro
body:
<<Torres>> Stanley. What are you up to this time?
<<Stanley>> Now now, Torres! That's no way to greet a friend!
<<Torres>> You're always up to something, Stanley. What do you want?
[[torres1]]

title: torres1_correct
body:
<<Torres>> Her Highness needs my help?
<<Stanley>> Yes, indeed! An errand of utmost urgency that only you, her dear knight, can handle!
<<Torres>> ...very well, then. And what errand would this be?
[[torres2]]

title: torres1_wrong1
body:
<<Torres>> A child? Forgive me, but I don't exactly have a presence that's comforting to children. Aren't [i]you[/i] better suited for this, Stanley?
<<Stanley>> That's true.. I've always been the more popular one amongst the children too!
<<Torres>> [i]Sighs[/i] Right... Well, if there isn't anything else, leave me be. I've got things to do.
<<Stanley>> Wait, hold on now, my friend! There's actually another thing I have to talk to you about!
[[torres1_check]]

title: torres1_wrong2
body:
<<Torres>> [i]*squints*[/i] A... cat? Stanley, can't you just use your magic to get the cat down?
<<Stanley>> I... Well, I suppose so! That must have slipped my mind, haha..!
<<Torres>> Right... Well, if there isn't anything else, leave me be. I've got things to do.
<<Stanley>> Wait, hold on now, my friend! There's actually another thing I have to talk to you about!
[[torres1_check]]

title: torres1_wrong3
body:
<<Torres>> ...seriously?
<<Stanley>> ...Did I get you?
<<Torres>> Leave me alone, Stanley. I've got better things to be doing.
<<Stanley>> Wait, hold on now, my friend! There really [i]is[/i] something I need to talk to you about!
<<Torres>> [i]Sighs[/i] This better actually be important, else I'm kicking you out of my room myself.
[[torres1_check]]

title: GoodEnding
body:
<<Stanley>> Wonderful! Now, I can just go over and...
<<Stanley>> There we go! The bar of chocolate has been obtained!

title: BadEnding
body:
<<Torres>> Stanley, I don't know what you're up to, but I don't have time for it! Get out of my room!
<<stanley>> Wait, Torres, I really do need to--
<<Torres>> Get out, now!!!

title: torres1
body:
<<Stanley>> (Hmm... I need to figure out a way to distract Torres from her axe, so that I can shave some chocolate off of it. What should I say?)
[[Krie needs your help with something.|torres1_correct]]
[[There's a crying child that needs comforting.|torres1_wrong1]]
[[A cat got stuck up on a tree, and it can't get down!|torres1_wrong2]]
[[Your shoelaces are untied!|torres1_wrong3]]

title: torres2
body:
<<Stanley>> (I've made some progress! Now, what's something that Her Highness would ask Torres to do?)
[[You have to bake a cupcake for her!|torres2_wrong1]]
[[She needs you to clean the greenhouse!|torres2_correct]]
[[a|torres2_wrong2]]
[[a|torres2_wrong3]]

title: torres2_correct
body:
<<Torres>> The greenhouse, you say? Well, I suppose I can spare some time if Her Highness really needs the help...
<<Stanley>> Of course! Someone as strong and capable as you would make light work of cleaning up a place even as big as the greenhouse!
<<Torres>>

title: torres1_check
body:
<<Stanley>> (I think Torres is getting suspicious of me! I've got to find a better plan before she loses her patience!) 
[[torres1]]

title: torres2_check
body:
<<Stanley>> (I think Torres is getting suspicious of me! I've got to find a better plan before she loses her patience!)
[[torres2]]
